file.subject: Case A-000
file.summary: Described as 'the first stable version of the Keeper identity.' But multiple versions of the same origin exist — each internally consistent, none verifiable as original.

records.label: Maya reading
records.value: The original matters because continuity matters

records.label: Eden reading
records.value: The original does not exist. Only functional versions do.

records.label: Reference state
records.value: Origin is no longer a fixed reference point

file.verdict: No origin can be verified as real. The system refuses to collapse them into one.
file.objective: Determine which origin is real — if any is.
